text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This power swelling from within... It<n>must be divine
protection from the<n>statue of the Goddesses!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! The Three Goddesses<n>are generous
in their blessings to<n>me... I, the Overlord, am a
genuine<n>legend!
